project.name: music-demo
project.description: Music demo project for IndyKite KBAC and ContX IQ

application.name: music-app
application.description: Music application that consumes the IndyKite Knowledge Graph

app_agent.name: music-agent
app_agent.description: App agent for the music demo

token_introspect.name: auth0-person-introspect
token_introspect.description: Introspect Auth0 tokens and upsert Person nodes

mcp_server.name: music-mcp-server
mcp_server.description: MCP Server configuration for the Music demo — binds the App Agent and Token Introspect used to authenticate inbound MCP traffic.

kbacs.name: concert-performer
kbacs.description: Person can PERFORM at venue if their karaoke_confidence >= venue's min_confidence

kbacs.name: venue-entry-by-membership
kbacs.description: Person can ENTER a Venue if they have WILL_ATTEND relationship

kbacs.name: flash-mob-recruitment
kbacs.description: Person can JOIN Flash-Mob-Recruitment only if dance_skill >= 0.85

kbacs.name: track-loudness-check
kbacs.description: Track can be PLAYED at Venue if loudness respects venue's max_loudness

kbacs.name: dmv-endless-suffering
kbacs.description: Track can PLAY at DMV-Waiting-Area only if duration >= 6:00 and energy <= 0.2

kbacs.name: playlist-venue-approval
kbacs.description: Playlist can be FEATURED at Venue if it has APPROVED_FOR relationship

kbacs.name: share-subscribed-playlist
kbacs.description: Person can SHARE a Playlist if they are SUBSCRIBED_TO it or CREATED it

kbacs.name: family-playlist-access
kbacs.description: Person can VIEW Playlist created by family member (MARRIED_TO, PARENT_OF, or child)

kbacs.name: corporate-no-enthusiasm
kbacs.description: Track can PLAY at Corporate-Meeting-Room only if energy <= 0.2 (no enthusiasm allowed)

kbacs.name: dj-at-venue
kbacs.description: Person can DJ at Venue if they WILL_ATTEND and have karaoke_confidence >= 0.8

policy.name: ciq-app-venue-playable-tracks
policy.description: Application can read and manage tracks that can be played at a venue

kq.name: kq-app-venue-playable-tracks-read
kq.display_name: App Query: Read Venue's Playable Tracks
kq.description: Call tool 'ciq_execute' with arguments: id: "<this query's id>", input_params: {venue_name: (required) name of the Venue (matches venue.property.name)}. Auth: X-IK-ClientKey only (_Application subject), no Bearer token; $_appId is auto-filled. Returns: for each Track playable at that venue: title, loudness, energy, danceability, duration, plus the PLAYED_AT relationship.

kq.name: kq-app-venue-playable-tracks-write
kq.display_name: App Query: Add Track to Venue
kq.description: Call tool 'ciq_execute' with arguments: id: "<this query's id>", input_params: {venue_name: (required) name of the Venue whose matched PLAYED_AT links are re-upserted}. Auth: X-IK-ClientKey only (_Application subject), no Bearer token; $_appId is auto-filled. Returns: track.external_id, venue.external_id, and the upserted PLAYED_AT relationship.

kq.name: kq-app-venue-playable-tracks-delete
kq.display_name: App Query: Remove Track from Venue
kq.description: Call tool 'ciq_execute' with arguments: id: "<this query's id>", input_params: {venue_name: (required) name of the Venue}. Auth: X-IK-ClientKey only (_Application subject), no Bearer token; $_appId is auto-filled. Returns: track.external_id for each Track whose PLAYED_AT link to the venue was deleted.

policy.name: ciq-app-artist-catalog
policy.description: Application can read and manage all tracks and albums by an artist

kq.name: kq-app-artist-catalog-read
kq.display_name: App Query: Read Artist's Full Catalog
kq.description: Call tool 'ciq_execute' with arguments: id: "<this query's id>", input_params: {artist_name: (required) name of the Artist}. Auth: X-IK-ClientKey only (_Application subject), no Bearer token; $_appId is auto-filled. Returns: each Track (title, duration, popularity) and its Album (title, year) in the artist's catalog, plus the CREATED and PART_OF relationships.

kq.name: kq-app-artist-catalog-write-track
kq.display_name: App Query: Add Track to Artist Catalog
kq.description: Call tool 'ciq_execute' with arguments: id: "<this query's id>", input_params: {artist_name: (required) name of the existing Artist to attach the track to, track_external_id: (required) external_id for the new Track, track_title: (required) track title, track_duration: (required) duration as a "M:SS" string, e.g. "3:13", track_popularity: (required) popularity number}. Auth: X-IK-ClientKey only (_Application subject), no Bearer token; $_appId is auto-filled. Returns: the new Track external_id and title, plus the CREATED and PART_OF relationships.

kq.name: kq-app-artist-catalog-write-album
kq.display_name: App Query: Add Album to Artist Catalog
kq.description: Call tool 'ciq_execute' with arguments: id: "<this query's id>", input_params: {artist_name: (required) name of the Artist, album_external_id: (required) external_id for the new Album, album_title: (required) album title, album_year: (required) release year as an integer}. Auth: X-IK-ClientKey only (_Application subject), no Bearer token; $_appId is auto-filled. Returns: the new Album external_id and title.

kq.name: kq-app-artist-catalog-delete
kq.display_name: App Query: Remove Track from Catalog
kq.description: Call tool 'ciq_execute' with arguments: id: "<this query's id>", input_params: {artist_name: (required) name of the Artist whose catalog tracks and CREATED/PART_OF links are deleted}. Auth: X-IK-ClientKey only (_Application subject), no Bearer token; $_appId is auto-filled. Returns: empty result on success.

policy.name: ciq-app-karaoke-ready-people
policy.display_name: App: Query Karaoke-Ready People at Venue
policy.description: Application can find people with high karaoke confidence at a venue

kq.name: kq-app-karaoke-ready-people
kq.display_name: App Query: Query Karaoke-Ready People at Venue
kq.description: Call tool 'ciq_execute' with arguments: id: "<this query's id>", input_params: {venue_name: (required) name of the Venue, min_confidence: (required) minimum karaoke_confidence threshold, number 0-1}. Auth: X-IK-ClientKey only (_Application subject), no Bearer token; $_appId is auto-filled. Returns: People attending the venue with karaoke_confidence >= min_confidence: firstname, lastname, karaoke_confidence, plus the relationship.

policy.name: ciq-person-own-profile
policy.display_name: Person: Read and Update Own Profile
policy.description: Person can read and update their own profile information

kq.name: kq-person-own-profile-read
kq.display_name: Person Query: Read Own Profile
kq.description: Call tool 'ciq_execute' with arguments: id: "<this query's id>", input_params: {} (no input parameters required). Auth: Bearer token required (Person subject); the token 'sub' identifies the caller Person (auto-filled, do not pass). Returns: the caller's own Person profile: firstname, lastname, email, age, city, state, music_mood, karaoke_confidence, dance_skill, profession.

kq.name: kq-person-own-profile-write
kq.display_name: Person Query: Update Own Profile
kq.description: Call tool 'ciq_execute' with arguments: id: "<this query's id>", input_params: {city: (required) new city, state: (required) new state, music_mood: (required) new music_mood string, karaoke_confidence: (required) new karaoke_confidence, number 0-1, dance_skill: (required) new dance_skill, number 0-1, profession: (required) new profession}. Auth: Bearer token required (Person subject); the token 'sub' identifies the caller Person (auto-filled, do not pass). Returns: the updated profile fields: city, state, music_mood, karaoke_confidence, dance_skill, profession.

policy.name: ciq-person-liked-tracks
policy.description: Person can read whether they like a given track, and unlike it (delete the LIKES relationship)

kq.name: kq-person-own-liked-tracks-read
kq.display_name: Person Query: Read Own Like of a Track
kq.description: Call tool 'ciq_execute' with arguments: id: "<this query's id>", input_params: {track_external_id: (required) external_id of the Track}. Auth: Bearer token (Person subject); 'sub' auto-filled. Returns: the track title/popularity and the LIKES relationship if the caller likes it (empty if not).

kq.name: kq-person-own-liked-tracks-delete
kq.display_name: Person Query: Unlike a Track
kq.description: Call tool 'ciq_execute' with arguments: id: "<this query's id>", input_params: {track_external_id: (required) external_id of the Track to unlike}. Auth: Bearer token (Person subject); 'sub' auto-filled. Returns: track.external_id of the unliked track.

policy.name: ciq-person-like-track
policy.description: Person can LIKE any existing track (creates a LIKES relationship to it)

kq.name: kq-person-own-liked-tracks-write
kq.display_name: Person Query: Like a Track
kq.description: Call tool 'ciq_execute' with arguments: id: "<this query's id>", input_params: {track_external_id: (required) external_id of the existing Track to like}. Auth: Bearer token (Person subject); 'sub' auto-filled. Returns: the new LIKES relationship.

policy.name: ciq-person-playlist-tracks-read
policy.display_name: Person: Read Own Playlist & Its Tracks
policy.description: Person can read a playlist they created together with the tracks on it (Track-[:PART_OF]->Playlist)

kq.name: kq-person-own-playlists-read
kq.display_name: Person Query: Read Own Playlist & Tracks
kq.description: Call tool 'ciq_execute' with input_params: {playlist_external_id: (required) external_id of the Playlist}. Auth: Bearer token (Person subject); 'sub' auto-filled. Returns the playlist name/mood and one row per track on it (title, external_id) via PART_OF. Empty if the caller did not create it or it has no tracks.

policy.name: ciq-person-update-playlist
policy.description: Person can rename/re-mood a playlist they created (by external_id)

kq.name: kq-person-own-playlists-update
kq.display_name: Person Query: Update Own Playlist
kq.description: Call tool 'ciq_execute' with input_params: {playlist_external_id: (required), playlist_name: (required) new name, playlist_mood: (required) new mood}. Auth: Bearer token (Person subject); 'sub' auto-filled. Returns the playlist external_id and updated name/mood.

policy.name: ciq-person-delete-playlist
policy.description: Person can delete a playlist they created (by external_id); cascades its PART_OF/CREATED edges

kq.name: kq-person-own-playlists-delete
kq.display_name: Person Query: Delete Own Playlist
kq.description: Call tool 'ciq_execute' with input_params: {playlist_external_id: (required) external_id of the Playlist to delete}. Auth: Bearer token (Person subject); 'sub' auto-filled. Deletes the playlist node.

policy.name: ciq-person-create-playlist
policy.description: Person can create a new Playlist, link it to themselves (CREATED), and add one or more existing tracks to it (Track-[:PART_OF]->Playlist)

kq.name: kq-person-own-playlists-write
kq.display_name: Person Query: Create a Playlist
kq.description: Call tool 'ciq_execute' with input_params: {playlist_external_id: (required) external_id for the new Playlist, playlist_name: (required) name, playlist_mood: (required) mood, track_external_ids: (required) array of existing Track external_ids to add}. Auth: Bearer token (Person subject); 'sub' auto-filled. Returns the new Playlist, the CREATED relationship, and a PART_OF relationship per added track.

policy.name: ciq-person-own-subscriptions
policy.description: Person can read and remove a SUBSCRIBED_TO relationship to a Playlist (by external_id)

kq.name: kq-person-own-subscriptions-read
kq.display_name: Person Query: Read Own Subscription
kq.description: Call tool 'ciq_execute' with input_params: {playlist_external_id: (required) external_id of the Playlist}. Auth: Bearer token (Person subject); 'sub' auto-filled. Returns the Playlist and the SUBSCRIBED_TO relationship if present (empty if not).

kq.name: kq-person-own-subscriptions-delete
kq.display_name: Person Query: Remove SUBSCRIBED_TO
kq.description: Call tool 'ciq_execute' with input_params: {playlist_external_id: (required) external_id of the Playlist}. Auth: Bearer token (Person subject); 'sub' auto-filled. Removes the caller's SUBSCRIBED_TO edge to it.

policy.name: ciq-person-subscribe-playlist
policy.description: Person can create a SUBSCRIBED_TO relationship to an existing Playlist (by external_id)

kq.name: kq-person-own-subscriptions-write
kq.display_name: Person Query: Create SUBSCRIBED_TO
kq.description: Call tool 'ciq_execute' with input_params: {playlist_external_id: (required) external_id of the existing Playlist}. Auth: Bearer token (Person subject); 'sub' auto-filled. Returns the new SUBSCRIBED_TO relationship.

policy.name: ciq-person-own-followed-artists
policy.description: Person can read and remove a FOLLOWS relationship to a Artist (by external_id)

kq.name: kq-person-own-followed-artists-read
kq.display_name: Person Query: Read Own Followed Artist
kq.description: Call tool 'ciq_execute' with input_params: {artist_external_id: (required) external_id of the Artist}. Auth: Bearer token (Person subject); 'sub' auto-filled. Returns the Artist and the FOLLOWS relationship if present (empty if not).

kq.name: kq-person-own-followed-artists-delete
kq.display_name: Person Query: Remove FOLLOWS
kq.description: Call tool 'ciq_execute' with input_params: {artist_external_id: (required) external_id of the Artist}. Auth: Bearer token (Person subject); 'sub' auto-filled. Removes the caller's FOLLOWS edge to it.

policy.name: ciq-person-follow-artist
policy.description: Person can create a FOLLOWS relationship to an existing Artist (by external_id)

kq.name: kq-person-own-followed-artists-write
kq.display_name: Person Query: Create FOLLOWS
kq.description: Call tool 'ciq_execute' with input_params: {artist_external_id: (required) external_id of the existing Artist}. Auth: Bearer token (Person subject); 'sub' auto-filled. Returns the new FOLLOWS relationship.

policy.name: ciq-person-own-venues
policy.description: Person can read and remove a WILL_ATTEND relationship to a Venue (by external_id)

kq.name: kq-person-own-venues-read
kq.display_name: Person Query: Read Own Venue Attendance
kq.description: Call tool 'ciq_execute' with input_params: {venue_external_id: (required) external_id of the Venue}. Auth: Bearer token (Person subject); 'sub' auto-filled. Returns the Venue and the WILL_ATTEND relationship if present (empty if not).

kq.name: kq-person-own-venues-delete
kq.display_name: Person Query: Remove WILL_ATTEND
kq.description: Call tool 'ciq_execute' with input_params: {venue_external_id: (required) external_id of the Venue}. Auth: Bearer token (Person subject); 'sub' auto-filled. Removes the caller's WILL_ATTEND edge to it.

policy.name: ciq-person-attend-venue
policy.description: Person can create a WILL_ATTEND relationship to an existing Venue (by external_id)

kq.name: kq-person-own-venues-write
kq.display_name: Person Query: Create WILL_ATTEND
kq.description: Call tool 'ciq_execute' with input_params: {venue_external_id: (required) external_id of the existing Venue}. Auth: Bearer token (Person subject); 'sub' auto-filled. Returns the new WILL_ATTEND relationship.

policy.name: ciq-person-family-playlists
policy.description: Person can read playlists created by family members

kq.name: kq-person-family-playlists
kq.display_name: Person Query: Read Family's Playlists
kq.description: Call tool 'ciq_execute' with arguments: id: "<this query's id>", input_params: {} (no input parameters required). Auth: Bearer token required (Person subject); the token 'sub' identifies the caller Person (auto-filled, do not pass). Returns: playlists created by the caller's family members: family member firstname, playlist name and mood.

policy.name: ciq-person-children-likes
policy.description: Parent can read tracks liked by their children

kq.name: kq-person-children-likes
kq.display_name: Person Query: Read Children's Liked Tracks
kq.description: Call tool 'ciq_execute' with arguments: id: "<this query's id>", input_params: {} (no input parameters required). Auth: Bearer token required (Person subject); the token 'sub' identifies the caller Person (auto-filled, do not pass). Returns: tracks liked by the caller's children: child firstname, track title, loudness, energy.

policy.name: ciq-person-venue-other-attendees
policy.description: Person can see other people attending the same venue

kq.name: kq-person-venue-other-attendees
kq.display_name: Person Query: Read Other Venue Attendees
kq.description: Call tool 'ciq_execute' with arguments: id: "<this query's id>", input_params: {venue_name: (required) name of a Venue the caller attends}. Auth: Bearer token required (Person subject); the token 'sub' identifies the caller Person (auto-filled, do not pass). Returns: other people attending that venue: firstname, karaoke_confidence, dance_skill.

policy.name: ciq-person-venue-playlists
policy.display_name: Person: Read & Unapprove Playlist at Venue
policy.description: Person can read and remove the APPROVED_FOR link between a playlist they created and a venue they attend

kq.name: kq-person-venue-playlists-read
kq.display_name: Person Query: Read Playlist Approval at Venue
kq.description: Call tool 'ciq_execute' with input_params: {venue_external_id: (required), playlist_external_id: (required)}. Auth: Bearer token (Person subject); 'sub' auto-filled. Returns the venue + playlist and the APPROVED_FOR relationship if the caller (who must attend the venue and have created the playlist) has approved it.

kq.name: kq-person-venue-playlists-delete
kq.display_name: Person Query: Unapprove Playlist at Venue
kq.description: Call tool 'ciq_execute' with input_params: {venue_external_id: (required), playlist_external_id: (required)}. Auth: Bearer token (Person subject); 'sub' auto-filled. Removes the APPROVED_FOR link.

policy.name: ciq-person-approve-playlist-for-venue
policy.display_name: Person: Approve Own Playlist for a Venue
policy.description: Person can APPROVE a playlist they created for a venue they will attend (creates APPROVED_FOR playlist->venue)

kq.name: kq-person-venue-playlists-write
kq.display_name: Person Query: Approve Playlist for Venue
kq.description: Call tool 'ciq_execute' with input_params: {venue_external_id: (required) external_id of a Venue the caller WILL_ATTEND, playlist_external_id: (required) external_id of a Playlist the caller CREATED}. Auth: Bearer token (Person subject); 'sub' auto-filled. Returns the new APPROVED_FOR relationship.

policy.name: ciq-person-same-taste
policy.display_name: Person: Find People with Similar Taste (Overlap-Based)
policy.description: Person can find others with similar taste based on overlap counts: shared liked tracks (above a threshold) AND either same city or enough shared followed artists. Uses COUNT aggregates, OPTIONAL MATCH, and nested AND/OR filter.
policy.policy: {"meta":{"policy_version":"1.0-ciq"},"subject":{"type":"Person"},"condition":{"cypher":"MATCH (subject:Person) WHERE subject.external_id = $token.sub MATCH (subject)-[:LIKES]->(track:Track)<-[:LIKES]-(other:Person) WHERE subject <> other WITH subject, other, COUNT(DISTINCT track) AS sharedTracks OPTIONAL MATCH (subject)-[:FOLLOWS]->(artist:Artist)<-[:FOLLOWS]-(other) WITH subject, other, sharedTracks, COUNT(DISTINCT artist) AS sharedArtists","filter":[{"operator":"AND","operands":[{"operator":"=","attribute":"subject.external_id","value":"$token.sub"},{"operator":">=","attribute":"sharedTracks","value":"$min_shared_tracks"},{"operator":"OR","operands":[{"operator":"=","attribute":"other.property.city","value":"$subject_city"},{"operator":">=","attribute":"sharedArtists","value":"$min_shared_artists"}]}]}]},"allowed_reads":{"nodes":["other.property.firstname","other.property.lastname","other.property.city","other.property.music_mood"],"aggregate_values":["sharedTracks","sharedArtists"]}}

kq.name: kq-person-same-taste
kq.display_name: Person Query: Find People with Similar Taste
kq.description: Call tool 'ciq_execute' with input_params: {min_shared_tracks: (required) min shared liked-track count, min_shared_artists: (required) min shared followed-artist count, subject_city: (required) the caller's own city (pass it explicitly - the engine cannot compare a person to their own property)}. Auth: Bearer token (Person subject); 'sub' auto-filled. Returns people who share >= min_shared_tracks tracks AND (live in subject_city OR share >= min_shared_artists artists): firstname, lastname, city, music_mood, sharedTracks, sharedArtists.

policy.name: ciq-person-same-artist-followers
policy.description: Person can find others who follow the same artists

kq.name: kq-person-same-artist-followers
kq.display_name: Person Query: Find Fellow Artist Followers
kq.description: Call tool 'ciq_execute' with arguments: id: "<this query's id>", input_params: {} (no input parameters required). Auth: Bearer token required (Person subject); the token 'sub' identifies the caller Person (auto-filled, do not pass). Returns: other people who follow the same artists as the caller: firstname, city, and the artist name.

policy.name: ciq-person-created-playlist-subscribers
policy.description: Person can see who subscribed to their playlists

kq.name: kq-person-created-playlist-subscribers
kq.display_name: Person Query: Read Own Playlist Subscribers
kq.description: Call tool 'ciq_execute' with arguments: id: "<this query's id>", input_params: {} (no input parameters required). Auth: Bearer token required (Person subject); the token 'sub' identifies the caller Person (auto-filled, do not pass). Returns: subscribers to playlists the caller created: playlist name, subscriber firstname and city.

policy.name: ciq-person-matching-venues
policy.display_name: Person: Find and Attend Venues Matching Skills
policy.description: Person can find venues where their skills meet requirements and plan attendance

kq.name: kq-person-matching-venues-read
kq.display_name: Person Query: Find Venues Matching Skills
kq.description: Call tool 'ciq_execute' with input_params: {karaoke_confidence: (required) the caller's own karaoke_confidence (pass it explicitly - the engine cannot read the subject's property for comparison)}. Auth: Bearer token (Person subject); 'sub' auto-filled. Returns venues whose min_confidence <= karaoke_confidence: name, min_confidence, external_id.

kq.name: kq-person-matching-venues-write
kq.display_name: Person Query: Plan Attendance at Matching Venue
kq.description: Call tool 'ciq_execute' with arguments: id: "<this query's id>", input_params: {} (no input parameters required). Auth: Bearer token required (Person subject); the token 'sub' identifies the caller Person (auto-filled, do not pass). Returns: venue external_id, name, and the WILL_ATTEND relationship (re-upserts the caller's matched attendances to matching venues).

policy.name: ciq-person-liked-tracks-at-venue
policy.display_name: Person: Find Liked Tracks Playable at Venue
policy.description: Person can find their liked tracks that can be played at a venue they attend

kq.name: kq-person-liked-tracks-at-venue
kq.display_name: Person Query: Find Liked Tracks Playable at Venue
kq.description: Call tool 'ciq_execute' with arguments: id: "<this query's id>", input_params: {} (no input parameters required). Auth: Bearer token required (Person subject); the token 'sub' identifies the caller Person (auto-filled, do not pass). Returns: the caller's liked tracks playable at venues they attend: track title, danceability, venue name.

policy.name: ciq-person-popular-tracks-by-followed
policy.display_name: Person: Popular Tracks Among Followed Artists
policy.description: Person can see tracks by artists they follow that have more than N likes
policy.policy: {"meta":{"policy_version":"1.0-ciq"},"subject":{"type":"Person"},"condition":{"cypher":"MATCH (subject:Person) WHERE subject.external_id = $token.sub MATCH (subject)-[:FOLLOWS]->(artist:Artist)-[:CREATED]->(track:Track)<-[:LIKES]-(fan:Person) WHERE fan <> subject WITH subject, artist, track, COUNT(fan) AS likeCount","filter":[{"operator":"AND","operands":[{"operator":"=","attribute":"subject.external_id","value":"$token.sub"},{"operator":">=","attribute":"likeCount","value":"$min_likes"}]}]},"allowed_reads":{"nodes":["track.property.title","track.property.popularity","artist.property.name"],"aggregate_values":["likeCount"]}}

kq.name: kq-person-popular-tracks-by-followed
kq.display_name: Person Query: Popular Tracks Among Followed Artists
kq.description: Call tool 'ciq_execute' with arguments: id: "<this query's id>", input_params: {min_likes: (required) minimum number of likes a track must have, integer}. Auth: Bearer token required (Person subject); the token 'sub' identifies the caller Person (auto-filled, do not pass). Returns: popular tracks by artists the caller follows: track title, popularity, artist name, plus the aggregate likeCount.

policy.name: ciq-person-liked-tracks-avg-energy
policy.display_name: Person: Average Energy of Liked Tracks
policy.description: Person can see average energy and danceability across all tracks they like
policy.policy: {"meta":{"policy_version":"1.0-ciq"},"subject":{"type":"Person"},"condition":{"cypher":"MATCH (subject:Person) WHERE subject.external_id = $token.sub MATCH (subject)-[:LIKES]->(track:Track) WITH subject, AVG(track.property.energy) AS avgEnergy, AVG(track.property.danceability) AS avgDanceability, COUNT(track) AS likedCount","filter":[{"operator":"=","attribute":"subject.external_id","value":"$token.sub"}]},"allowed_reads":{"nodes":["subject.property.firstname"],"aggregate_values":["avgEnergy","avgDanceability","likedCount"]}}

kq.name: kq-person-liked-tracks-avg-energy
kq.display_name: Person Query: Liked Tracks Energy Stats
kq.description: Call tool 'ciq_execute' with arguments: id: "<this query's id>", input_params: {} (no input parameters required). Auth: Bearer token required (Person subject); the token 'sub' identifies the caller Person (auto-filled, do not pass). Returns: the caller's firstname plus aggregate stats over their liked tracks: avgEnergy, avgDanceability, likedCount.

policy.name: ciq-app-venue-attendance-stats
policy.display_name: App: Venue Attendance and Playlist Stats
policy.description: Application can read attendee count and optional approved-playlist count for a venue
policy.policy: {"meta":{"policy_version":"1.0-ciq"},"subject":{"type":"_Application"},"condition":{"cypher":"MATCH (subject:_Application) MATCH (venue:Venue) OPTIONAL MATCH (venue)<-[:WILL_ATTEND]-(attendee:Person) WITH subject, venue, COUNT(attendee) AS attendeeCount OPTIONAL MATCH (playlist:Playlist)-[:APPROVED_FOR]->(venue) WITH subject, venue, attendeeCount, COUNT(playlist) AS playlistCount","filter":[{"operator":"AND","operands":[{"operator":"=","attribute":"subject.external_id","value":"$_appId"},{"operator":"=","attribute":"venue.property.name","value":"$venue_name"}]}]},"allowed_reads":{"nodes":["venue.property.name","venue.property.description"],"aggregate_values":["attendeeCount","playlistCount"]}}

kq.name: kq-app-venue-attendance-stats
kq.display_name: App Query: Venue Attendance & Playlist Stats
kq.description: Call tool 'ciq_execute' with arguments: id: "<this query's id>", input_params: {venue_name: (required) name of the Venue}. Auth: X-IK-ClientKey only (_Application subject), no Bearer token; $_appId is auto-filled. Returns: venue name and description, plus aggregate counts attendeeCount and playlistCount.

policy.name: ciq-person-people-in-venue-list
policy.display_name: Person: Find Attendees Across Venue Whitelist
policy.description: Person can find people attending any venue in a given external_id list

kq.name: kq-person-people-in-venue-list
kq.display_name: Person Query: Attendees Across Venue Whitelist
kq.description: Call tool 'ciq_execute' with arguments: id: "<this query's id>", input_params: {venue_ids: (required) array of Venue external_id strings to filter by}. Auth: Bearer token required (Person subject); the token 'sub' identifies the caller Person (auto-filled, do not pass). Returns: people attending any of the listed venues: firstname, city, and venue name.

policy.name: ciq-person-eligible-venues-broad
policy.display_name: Person: Eligible Venues by Confidence OR Skill
policy.description: Person can read venues where their karaoke_confidence OR dance_skill clears the venue's bar (and venue is open-attendance)

kq.name: kq-person-eligible-venues-broad
kq.display_name: Person Query: Eligible Venues by Confidence OR Skill
kq.description: Call tool 'ciq_execute' with input_params: {dance_skill: (required) the caller's own dance_skill (pass it explicitly - the engine cannot read the subject's property for comparison)}. Auth: Bearer token (Person subject); 'sub' auto-filled. Returns venues whose min_danceability <= dance_skill: name, min_danceability, external_id.

policy.name: ciq-person-own-playlist-engagement
policy.display_name: Person: Engagement Metrics for Own Playlists
policy.description: Person can see subscriber count and venue-approval count per playlist they created
policy.policy: {"meta":{"policy_version":"1.0-ciq"},"subject":{"type":"Person"},"condition":{"cypher":"MATCH (subject:Person) WHERE subject.external_id = $token.sub MATCH (subject)-[:CREATED]->(playlist:Playlist) OPTIONAL MATCH (playlist)<-[:SUBSCRIBED_TO]-(sub:Person) WITH subject, playlist, COUNT(sub) AS subscriberCount OPTIONAL MATCH (playlist)-[:APPROVED_FOR]->(venue:Venue) WITH subject, playlist, subscriberCount, COUNT(venue) AS approvedVenueCount","filter":[{"operator":"=","attribute":"subject.external_id","value":"$token.sub"}]},"allowed_reads":{"nodes":["playlist.property.name","playlist.property.mood"],"aggregate_values":["subscriberCount","approvedVenueCount"]}}

kq.name: kq-person-own-playlist-engagement
kq.display_name: Person Query: Own Playlist Engagement
kq.description: Call tool 'ciq_execute' with arguments: id: "<this query's id>", input_params: {} (no input parameters required). Auth: Bearer token required (Person subject); the token 'sub' identifies the caller Person (auto-filled, do not pass). Returns: each owned playlist's name and mood, plus aggregate counts subscriberCount and approvedVenueCount.
